lines.speaker: Chancellor Hassan
lines.text: Thank you for being a friend to Al Kharid. You are always welcome here.

sections.title: Attempting to climb through the big window

lines.speaker: Hassan
lines.text: Hey, do not treat the Emir's palace like a climbing frame for children, whoever you are!

lines.speaker: Hassan
lines.text: Hey, while you have our gratitude for saving the prince, you must earn our trust more fully before the Emir will tolerate you climbing through his windows like a thief!

lines.speaker: Chancellor Hassan
lines.text: Greetings! I am Hassan, Chancellor to the Emir of Al Kharid.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's just too hot here. How can you stand it?

lines.speaker: Chancellor Hassan
lines.text: We manage, in our humble way. We are a wealthy town and we have water. It cures many thirsts.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you mind if I just kill your warriors?

lines.speaker: Chancellor Hassan
lines.text: Kill our warriors? I assume this is some sort of joke?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'll take that as a no. Forget I asked.

lines.speaker: Hassan
lines.text: You are a friend of the town of Al-Kharid. If we have more tasks to complete, we will ask you. Please, keep in contact. Good employees are not easy to find.

lines.speaker: Hassan
lines.text: Greetings I am Hassan, Chancellor to the Emir of Al- Kharid.

lines.speaker: Hassan
lines.text: We manage, in our humble way. We are a wealthy town and we have water. It cures many thirsts.

lines.speaker: Hassan
lines.text: You are welcome. They are not expensive. We have them here to stop the elite guard being bothered. They are a little harder to kill.
